name: Hemp Seeds

pros.title: usually brings decent fat support
pros.explanation: That is one of the category strengths.

pros.title: easy to sprinkle into meals for a real upgrade
pros.explanation: Seeds often shine as support foods.

pros.title: tiny food with serious nutrient density
pros.explanation: Seeds often overperform for their size.

cons.title: real serving sizes are often small
cons.explanation: Some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice.

cons.title: paper scores can overstate realistic serving sizes
cons.explanation: People often eat far less than 100 grams.

cons.title: calorie density still stacks up fast
cons.explanation: Tiny foods can still overshoot fast.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
